summary: High‑quality soundboard mix of a solid performance makes this the go‑to version of the show.
review: Both reviewers praise the balance and clarity of the recording, noting it isn’t overly tinny or mid‑rangey and that the soundboard mix is well‑balanced. They also label the release as a keeper and one of the better MOTB issues, indicating a generally strong musical performance even though no specific songs are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews focus on the excellent recording balance and overall quality of the show, yielding a solid above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced mix; not too tinny or mid‑rangey; soundboard source praised for consistency.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers consider the overall performance a keeper.
